profile_backed_target.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-profile-pass162 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(eig_48x48_f64|eigh_48x48_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|pinv_192x192_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|svd_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_full_f64|matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64)' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 5

lever.summary: The KC-blocked GEMM full-tile microkernel now uses Simd<f64,8> accumulators for each MR row instead of scalar NR arrays.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-f71wy-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10

after.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-f71wy-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: Thread row ownership, pc-block order, j-panel order, i-tile order, and ascending inner-l traversal are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: GEMM has no pivot or tie-breaking surface; output row-major element order is unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Each output lane still applies additions in the same l order, seeded from the running C value at each pc block. SIMD changes lane representation only; it introduces no horizontal reductions, reordered sums, mixed precision, or new FMA surface beyond the existing flat SIMD GEMM path.
isomorphism_proof.error_surface: matmul_2d public shape contract, empty-dimension behavior, row partitioning, and output layout are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.nan_surface: NaN and signed-zero propagation follow the same per-element arithmetic order, covered by special-value and release-mode bit-identity tests.

fallback: If a future GEMM parity or performance regression appears, revert this commit to restore scalar NR arrays in matmul_2d_blocked_row_block.
next_profile_note: Re-profile linalg after this keep because GEMM2048 moved from top row to a lower-cost shape.
